title: Absolute Smooth Texture (AST)
description: A simple 742×742 texture pack hand-painted with IbisPaint.
body:
🌟Absolute Smooth Texture | AST

A simple 742×742 texture pack hand-painted with IbisPaint.
Every block was drawn from scratch to bring a soft, smooth, and realistic feel to Minecraft without changing its original style.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎨 Features

742×742 hand-painted block textures

Maintains the vanilla color tone while making blocks smoother

Works with Minecraft 1.21+

Ideal for realistic builds, cinematic videos, or peaceful survival worlds

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
💡 Recommended Settings

Graphics: Fancy or Fabulous

Mipmaps: 4 or higher

Shaders: Optional — works great even without them

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🛠️ Tools Used

IbisPaint X for painting

ConvertCloud for format conversion

Minecraft 1.21 Resource Pack System

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
💬 Notes

This pack is still being expanded — more blocks and details will come in future updates.
Feedback and suggestions are always welcome!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

<details>
<summary>Some of the Tags will came out in feature updates</summary>

All Items

All Mobs

All Blocks

All Animated Blocks, Mobs, Items

</details>
